title: Robotics Championship 2025
description: The annual robotics showdown featuring line followers, maze solvers, and robo-soccer.
body:
The biggest robotics showdown of the year has concluded! Thank you to all the amazing teams who participated.

## Featured Events
- Line Follower challenge
- Autonomous Maze Solving
- Robo-Soccer Tournament

title: Annual Tech Hackathon 2026
description: Join us for 48 hours of intense coding, building, and innovation. Prizes worth $5000 up for grabs!
body:
Welcome to the **Annual Tech Hackathon 2026**! Gather your team of up to 4 members to build the next big thing.

## Theme
- EdTech & E-Learning
- Sustainability
- Open Innovation

## Schedule
**Day 1**
- 9:00 AM: Registration & Opening Ceremony
- 10:00 AM: Hacking Begins

*More details to be announced soon.*
